title: Pushbutton & Selector Switch Price in Pakistan 2026 — Emergency Stop, Pilot Lamp & MCC Operator Panel Complete Buyer Guide
summary_html: 22mm pushbutton Rs. 280–650 | Emergency Stop Rs. 750–1,800 | Selector Switch Rs. 420–950 | Pilot Lamp Rs. 180–320 | 30mm Heavy-Duty Rs. 1,800–2,800. Pakistan's most complete operator panel buyer guide 2026 — IP65 options, Pakistan labour inspection E-stop compliance, PLC AUTO/MANUAL selector wiring, MCC panel layout, 22mm vs 30mm cutout standard, and brand comparison. Available at CNC Electric Pakistan with nationwide delivery.
